message:
fix: harden arithmetic operations and sanitize socket path

Three defensive hardening fixes from code audit:

- src/daemon/protocol.rs: Sanitize USER env var in socket path
  construction. Filters to alphanumeric/dash/underscore chars, caps
  at 64 characters, falls back to "unknown" on empty. Prevents
  potential path traversal via crafted USER values.

- src/search/query.rs: Use saturating_mul/saturating_sub for
  SQL placeholder capacity calculation (count*2-1) to prevent
  theoretical overflow with extreme input sizes.

- src/search/tantivy.rs: Replace three instances of
  `as_millis() as i64` with `i64::try_from().unwrap_or(i64::MAX)`
  to prevent silent truncation of u128 durations exceeding i64 range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
